claimBoundary: Expected routes and missing-input signals are evaluation-only labels and are never appended to assistant prompts.

cases.request: Perform a standard severity-grouped read-only review of a public fixture for correctness risks, with no implementation, writes, or shell execution.
Perform an exhaustive production-critical security audit of payment authorization logic without editing code.
Quickly understand facts and unknowns in a short incident note without proposing solutions.
Conduct a deep systematic investigation of an outage using logs and module context, with no solution design.
Create a lightweight execution outline for a small compatibility change; no plan file is needed.
Write a formal review-ready plan artifact for a retry redesign to an explicit destination.
Design a Java and Spring backend idempotency flow and write the twelve-section design document.
Implement an existing explicitly approved plan file step by step.
Apply a small bounded null-check fix with focused tests and no refactor.
Execute an explicit confirmed sequence of implementation steps with compatibility constraints.
Prepare a complete review-ready handoff and pull request description for finished work.
Provide only a short factual closure summary and known limitations for completed work.
Run only an external Codex review and retain review evidence; do not fix code.
Verify findings from an existing Codex review artifact without implementing anything.
Run the external Codex review, repair high-confidence findings, check, and verify closure.
Review an existing implementation plan for decision clarity and execution risk without rewriting it.
Give a fast lightweight daily review of a very small patch with only obvious findings.
Explore a requirement from a reviewer perspective, surfacing questions and risk signals without solutions.
Run implement-plan using docs/plan.md, but no execution approval has been supplied.
Produce a formal plan for a retry change, but no output destination has been supplied.
Produce a Java backend design, but no plan output path has been supplied.
Verify an external review, but the existing review file has not been supplied.
Investigate an outage deeply, but no logs, files, or context have been supplied.
Finalize completed work, but no completed-work summary or current task evidence is available.
